questionHtml:
What is a feature of phagocytic white blood cells?

A. Stimulate blood clotting

B. Found only in the circulatory system

C. Form part of non-specific immunity

D. Produce antibodies

meta.title: What is a feature of phagocytic white blood cells? A. Stimulate blood clotting B. Found only in the circulatory system C. Form part of non-specific immunity D. Produce antibodies
